recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.

recommendations.title: Counter Investigation
recommendations.overview: A cop investigates whether the man convicted of murdering his daughter is really guilty.

recommendations.title: No Rest for the Wicked

recommendations.title: Wanda
recommendations.overview: After a string of abusive relationships, Wanda abandons her family and seeks solace in the company of a petty criminal.

recommendations.title: Mimic: Sentinel
recommendations.overview: A man enclosed in a plastic bubble, his sister, and their best friend must defend an apartment complex from the mutant Judas Breed insects.

recommendations.title: Torrente 5: Operation Eurovegas
recommendations.overview: Crooked cop Torrente gets out of jail in the year 2018 to find a different Spain from the one he knew.

recommendations.title: Loulou
recommendations.overview: A bored wife leaves her husband for an unemployed, petty criminal.

recommendations.title: Code Name: Emperor
recommendations.overview: Juan, a secret service agent, approaches Wendy, a young Filipina who works as a maid for a suspicious couple.

recommendations.title: The Blonde One

recommendations.title: Kaithi
recommendations.overview: Dilli, a convicted criminal, is out on parole to meet his daughter. However, a drug bust sets him off on a mission to save the life of police officers.
